nodes.context: Community-based militia groups active in the DRC, formed to defend local communities and territory against other armed groups.
Rwanda-allied Banyamulenge-dominated rebel faction during the Second Congo War.
Mai-Mai group organized in 2007 by General Yakutumba, received aid from the DRC government.

nodes.standard_name: Mudundu 40 / Front de Résistance et de Défense du Kivu
nodes.original_text_name: Mudundu 40 / Front de Résistance et de Défense du Kivu (FRDKI)
nodes.context: Smaller Mai-Mai group reported to cooperate with Rwandan military and RCD-Goma.

nodes.standard_name: Mouvement de Lutte contre l'Agression au Zaïre / Forces Unies de Résistance Nationale contre l'Agression de la Républíque Démocratique du Congo
nodes.original_text_name: Mouvement de Lutte contre l'Agression au Zaïre / Forces Unies de Résistance Nationale contre l'Agression de la Républíque Démocratique du Congo (MLAZ/FURNAC)
nodes.context: Smaller Mai-Mai group reported to cooperate with Rwandan military and RCD-Goma.

nodes.original_text_name: Nduma Defense of Congo (or Mai-Mai Sheka)
nodes.context: Mai-Mai group formed in 2009 by Ntabo Ntaberi Sheka, accused of mass rape in 2010.
Mai-Mai group formed by Gédéon Kyungu Mutanga after his escape in 2011, meaning 'Secede Katanga'.
Mai-Mai group commanded by Gedeon Kyungu Mutanga, loosely tied to Mai-Mai Kata Katanga.

aliases: Co-ordination for a Referendum on Self-determination for Katanga
nodes.context: Group composed mainly of former Katanga Tigers, separatist group active in the 1960s.

edges.evidence_quote: While militias have long been common in the Kivus, particularly among the minority Batembo and Babembe ethnic groups, the recent wars and conflicts caused large numbers of town dwellers to form Mai-Mai.
edges.context: Mai-Mai were active in areas controlled by RCD-Goma during the Second Congo War.

edges.source: Mudundu 40 / Front de Résistance et de Défense du Kivu
edges.evidence_quote: A number of smaller Mai-Mai groups, such as the Mudundu 40 / Front de Résistance et de Défense du Kivu (FRDKI) and Mouvement de Lutte contre l'Agression au Zaïre / Forces Unies de Résistance Nationale contre l'Agression de la Républíque Démocratique du Congo (MLAZ/FURNAC), were reported to cooperate with the Rwandan military and Rally for Congolese Democracy–Goma (RCD-Goma).

edges.source: Mouvement de Lutte contre l'Agression au Zaïre / Forces Unies de Résistance Nationale contre l'Agression de la Républíque Démocratique du Congo
edges.evidence_quote: A number of smaller Mai-Mai groups, such as the Mudundu 40 / Front de Résistance et de Défense du Kivu (FRDKI) and Mouvement de Lutte contre l'Agression au Zaïre / Forces Unies de Résistance Nationale contre l'Agression de la Républíque Démocratique du Congo (MLAZ/FURNAC), were reported to cooperate with the Rwandan military and Rally for Congolese Democracy–Goma (RCD-Goma).
Mai-Mai Gedeon is also commanded by Gedeon Kyungu Mutanga and loosely tied to his Mai-Mai Kata Katanga.
edges.context: Mai-Mai Gedeon is loosely tied to Mai-Mai Kata Katanga.
